positioning: Saudi B2B AI Operating Systems company

products.name: Revenue Command Room OS
products.primary_pain: scattered leads, proposals, follow-ups, and no daily commercial decision
products.proof: daily queue, proposal queue, next actions, weekly revenue memo

products.name: Company Brain OS
products.primary_pain: owners do not have a daily decision layer across revenue, clients, risks, and opportunities
products.proof: daily decision, risk radar, opportunity register, board memo

products.name: Follow-up Recovery OS
products.primary_pain: WhatsApp, inbox, calls, and inquiries create missed follow-ups
products.proof: classified follow-up queue, draft replies, overdue follow-ups, owner report

products.name: Client Delivery OS
products.primary_pain: delivery work is not visible, proof is weak, and renewals are late
products.proof: client workspace, delivery board, proof pack, renewal queue

products.name: AI Trust and Governance OS
products.primary_pain: AI is used without policy, review gates, privacy discipline, or approval workflow
products.proof: AI usage policy, human review gates, data handling SOP, output review log
